rationale.fidelity: Correctly makes the five-minute incumbent the executable plan while retaining routing, timing, constraints, and the routing-plus-lateness objective.
rationale.managerial_framing: Fully connects early search progress to a fixed release deadline and supplies a matched-method counterfactual and latency-quality trade-off.
rationale.scholarly_positioning: No unsupported scholarly claim is made; the research question is bounded rather than cast as established contribution.
rationale.evidence_discipline: Explicitly treats better early quality as unestablished and specifies matched testing and uncertainty requirements.
rationale.prose_clarity: Accurate and well organized but much longer than the prompt requires, with repeated mappings and garbled punctuation.
rationale.overall: Substantively excellent and operationally concrete, though needlessly elaborate.
